goal: 删除容易误用的 mainline merge 命令

summary.title: 删除 mainline merge 命令
summary.what: 移除用户可见的 `mainline merge` 命令、CLI 注册、`Service.Merge` API、对应 MERGE_FAILED error code 和 squash/no-ff helper；把 pin 命令文件从 merge.go 拆成 pin.go。测试里的 merged intent seed 改为普通 git squash merge 后由 `mainline sync` 自动 pin，文档、agent 模板和 repo skill 不再提示 agents 运行 `mainline merge`。同时让 Abandon 在本地 draft 落后时优先尊重 synced view 里的 terminal 状态，避免已 pin 到 main 的 intent 被 stale draft 继续 abandon。
summary.why: 用户确认 `mainline merge` 是早期 MVP 历史残留：现代 Mainline 设计应由普通 Git/GitHub/GitLab 流程合并代码，再由 sync/pin 绑定 intent metadata。继续暴露该命令容易让 agent 把“push main”误解成调用 Mainline 自带 merge，从而绕过团队 commit message 规则并生成错误 main commit。
summary.user_goal: 删除容易误用的 mainline merge 命令

decisions.chose: 同时删除 CLI 命令和 `Service.Merge` API，而不是只隐藏 help。
decisions.rationale: 只隐藏命令仍会留下内部调用和测试示例，后续 agent 或脚本容易继续复用旧路径；删除 API 可以让现代 sync/pin 路径成为唯一代码合并后的绑定方式。
rejected: 只把 mainline merge 标成 deprecated
保留 Service.Merge 供测试继续使用

decisions.chose: 保留 `via=merge` 的读取语义，并新增/保留测试证明 sync 能读取旧 mainline merge 写过的 note。
decisions.rationale: 删除命令不应该破坏历史仓库里已经存在的 commit notes；旧数据仍应 materialize 成 merged intent。

decisions.point: 测试里的 merged intent seed
decisions.chose: 改为普通 `git merge --squash` + `mainline sync` auto-pin。
decisions.rationale: 这更接近现在推荐的 GitHub squash merge 设计，也避免测试继续把 removed command 当主流程。

decisions.chose: terminal 状态优先读取 synced view，而不是只信本地 draft。
decisions.rationale: 移除 Service.Merge 后，本地 draft 不再被 merge path 改成 merged；现代 merged truth 来自 sync/pin view，Abandon 也要按这个 truth 防止非法状态转换。

review_notes: 验证：go test ./internal/engine -run '^$' 通过，覆盖 engine 包测试编译。
验证：go run . merge --help 返回 unknown command；go run . --help 不再列出 merge 命令；go run . pin --help 正常。
未运行仓库级 make test；按仓库约束避免本地跑耗时 Go make test。go test ./internal/engine -count=1 曾无输出运行数分钟，被中断，未作为通过结论。
context 提示与当前 proposed fork contributor transport 工作有文件重叠；本改动语义集中在删除 legacy merge 命令和现代 sync/pin 路径，未触碰 fork import 的 transport/trust boundary 逻辑。

architectural_claims: Mainline no longer owns a code-merge operation; code delivery stays in normal Git/GitHub/GitLab workflows and Mainline binds metadata afterward via sync/pin.
Legacy commit notes with via=merge remain readable even though no current command writes that value.
Merged status truth for local lifecycle guards comes from the materialized view when it is terminal, not only from mutable local draft files.
behavioral_changes: `mainline merge` is no longer a registered CLI command and now returns unknown command.
The exported engine `Service.Merge` merge helper is removed.
`mainline pin` remains the manual fallback and is still registered under advanced commands.
Docs and agent guidance now instruct users to merge through normal Git/GitHub/GitLab workflows and rely on sync auto-pin, with manual pin only for misses.
Abandon rejects intents that the synced view already shows as terminal, including merged intents whose local draft file still says proposed or sealed_local.

data_model_changes.name: CommitNote.via
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing via=merge notes remain supported as legacy data; no new command writes them.

migration_notes: Scripts that called `mainline merge --intent <id>` must switch to ordinary git/GitHub/GitLab merge followed by `mainline sync`; if auto-pin misses, use `mainline pin <intent> <commit>`.
Go callers using `Service.Merge` must replace it with normal git operations plus `Service.Sync` or `Service.PinExplicit` as appropriate.
